task_completion.description: The agent opened JFrog Artifactory in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the JFrog Artifactory login page or dashboard, with 'localhost:8082' in the address bar.

task_completion.description: The agent logged into Artifactory as the 'admin' user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory interface shows the user is logged in as 'admin' (typically visible in the top right corner or user profile section).

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the access token generation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Access Tokens' or 'Identity and Access' page is open in the Artifactory UI, showing the form or button to generate a new token.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully generated an access token.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A newly generated access token string (often a long alphanumeric string or JWT) is displayed on the Artifactory screen.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the token string to the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is visible showing the generated token string being saved to the file path '/home/ga/ci_access_token.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory web UI to generate the token.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Artifactory web interface to create the token, rather than using terminal commands like 'curl' to hit the API directly.

integrity.description: The token saved to the file appears to be the actual token generated from Artifactory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The string saved in '/home/ga/ci_access_token.txt' should visually match the token generated in the Artifactory UI, or at least appear to be a valid, long token string rather than a placeholder.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application to just create a fake output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be evidence of the agent actually logging into Artifactory and generating a token before creating the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Artifactory URL: http://localhost:8082. Admin credentials: admin / password. Output file path: /home/ga/ci_access_token.txt.
